title: Snap to AI – One-Keystroke Screenshots to Claude, ChatGPT, etc. (macOS)
abstract: Tired of complicated screenshots? Snap to AI is your personal screenshot assistant, sending snaps directly to AI powerhouses like Claude and ChatGPT with just one keystroke! No more worries about paths or formats. Try it out and make your workflow a breeze!
abstract_zh: 你是不是常常觉得截屏麻烦？Snap to AI 就像你的私人截屏助手，一键直达各大AI神器 Claude、ChatGPT等！再也不用怕忘记保存路径或格式不对啦。试试看吧，让工作变得更轻松！
